test:backend.notes: 148 passed, 7 errors. Same errors as round 2: admin_user_token fixture uses AsyncSessionLocal() to connect to real database, causing InvalidPasswordError. This is a test infrastructure issue - fixtures should use test database overrides.

test:frontend.notes: 2 passed, 29 failed. Same React version mismatch error as round 2: 'A React Element from an older version of React was rendered.' This is a Next.js + vitest bundling issue, not a code bug.

lint:frontend.notes: Passed with only warnings (unused-vars, no-img-element, no-explicit-any).

typecheck:frontend.notes: TypeScript type check passed with no errors.

reviewsSummary.notes: Did not spawn review subagents because validators still fail. Per skill procedure: 'Do not proceed to feature review' when validators fail. Prior round reviews (round 2) documented 6 blocking issues across subscription-module and community-module that remain unresolved.

blockingIssues.description: CRITICAL: All subscription module code remains UNTRACKED in git. Files not tracked: apps/api/internal/subscriptions/{models.py, repository.py, router.py, schemas.py, service.py}, apps/web/src/app/pricing/, apps/web/src/components/ui/PremiumGate.tsx, apps/web/src/lib/api/subscriptions.ts. Only __init__.py is tracked. This code is not version controlled and will be lost on branch reset.

Server-side premium endpoint gating NOT implemented. The require_premium_access dependency exists in shared/dependencies.py but is not used by ANY API endpoint. Premium content is not protected by 403 responses.
No tests created for subscription module. No test_subscriptions.py exists in apps/api/tests/. Despite backend-worker skill requiring TDD, no test file was created.
Expected behavior 'Renewal reminder: notification sent 3 days before expiry' is NOT implemented. No background task or notification logic exists for subscription renewal reminders.

fetchCurrentUser() returns User type that does NOT include 'role' field. The User interface only has {sub, email, name, picture}. Moderator UI checks (currentUserRole) will never work because role is never fetched.
blockingIssues.location: apps/web/src/lib/auth.ts - User interface and transformUser function

blockingIssues.description: Report button on discussion detail page has no onClick handler. Users cannot report inappropriate content.
Frontend test infrastructure broken: React version mismatch causes all component tests to fail. vi.mock issue but React dual-copy problem persists. Tests cannot run.

Backend admin tests use real database connection instead of test database. admin_user_token fixture uses AsyncSessionLocal() connecting to real postgres, causing password auth failures in test environment.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit requirement that all new feature code must be committed to git BEFORE marking feature as complete. Untracked files should be treated as incomplete. Workers must run `git add` and `git commit` before declaring feature done.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: subscription-module has 8 files untracked despite being marked 'completed' for multiple rounds

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD requirement - reviewers must verify test files exist and pass, not just that curl/agent-browser verification was done. Without tests, feature should not pass scrutiny.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: subscription-module marked complete but has no test file despite TDD skill requirement

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add requirement: API client functions must be verified to exist before importing in components.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: community-module imports fetchCurrentUser but User type doesn't include role field needed for moderator checks

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add test infrastructure requirement: all test fixtures must use test database overrides, never real database connections. Provide conftest.py fixture template for overriding AsyncSessionLocal.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: test_admin_users.py admin_user_token fixture uses AsyncSessionLocal() connecting to real postgres
